title: Assistant district attorneys
doc_html:
PART V.  FIFTH JUDICIAL DISTRICT

§141.  Assistant district attorneys

The offices of the first and second assistant district attorneys are hereby created for the Fifth Judicial District.  

Amended by Acts 1950, No. 293, §1.
doc_text:
PART V.  FIFTH JUDICIAL DISTRICT
§141.  Assistant district attorneys
The offices of the first and second assistant district attorneys are hereby created for the Fifth Judicial District.
Amended by Acts 1950, No. 293, §1.
